summary: Verified bug fix: PATCH /api/contacts/{id} now auto-syncs monto_recuperado when estado changes. All 11 tests pass (6 bug-fix scenarios + 5 regression tests).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1111 lines — consider splitting into routers (contacts, reports, whatsapp) for maintainability.

Regression logic in update_contact resets monto_recuperado only when current_rec >= monto; if a user had a partial recovery and then sets estado='pendiente', the partial is preserved — behavior is intentional but worth documenting.
seed_data_creation: Each test creates a TEST_-prefixed contact and deletes it after use (self-cleaning).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified: marking contact 'pagado' now automatically sets monto_recuperado = monto (unless explicit value provided). Regression to 'pendiente' or 'sin_contacto' from fully-paid resets monto_recuperado to 0. 'parcial' does not touch it. reports/summary correctly reflects the new recovered amount.
verified_scenarios: notes, reminders, filter by estado, whatsapp/import endpoints still working
